title: adesmia herteri
intro: Adesmia herteri is a species of legume plant in the family Fabaceae, native to the Andes mountains. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, including relieving congestion, reducing fever, and soothing sore throats. Adesmia herteri is often prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the dried leaves and flowers in hot water, which can be consumed up to three times a day to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
